boot console output

The 'Jumper EZBook 2' is very cheap Apple Macbook Air laptop clone:
https://www.amazon.com/Jumper-Ultrabook-1-84GHz-Windows-Notebook/dp/B01HCTGZLY
https://www.gearbest.com/laptops/pp_356746.html

I used the bsd_FreeBSD-12.0-CURRENT-amd64-20180503-r333209-memstick.img image and it freezes as shown in the screenshots.

Regards.
